channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Strikes Iranian Radar Sites After Drone Launches Near Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US forces struck Iranian coastal radar sites on Qeshm Island after shooting down drones launched by Iran toward the Strait of Hormuz, CENTCOM said. The escalation complicates ongoing diplomatic efforts to end the conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine and Russia Exchange 185 Prisoners Each in Latest POW Swap
item.description: Ukraine and Russia each exchanged 185 service personnel in the latest prisoner of war swap on Friday, officials in both countries said, continuing the pattern of periodic exchanges despite the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China's Xi Jinping to Visit North Korea in First Trip in Nearly 7 Years
item.description: China announced President Xi Jinping will visit North Korea on a two-day trip from June 8, his first in nearly seven years, as Beijing seeks to reassert ties with Pyongyang, its only formal treaty ally.

item.title: ⚽ Iran World Cup Players Granted US Visas Despite Ongoing Conflict
item.description: Iran's World Cup soccer players have been granted visas to enter the United States, a White House official confirmed, just 10 days before their first match in Los Angeles amid the ongoing conflict between the two countries.

item.title: 🇰🇵 North Korea's Kim Showcases New Warship Ahead of Xi Jinping Visit
item.description: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un observed sea trials of a new warship repaired after a failed launch last year and vowed to strengthen the navy, state media reported, days before Chinese President Xi Jinping's visit.

item.title: ⚔️ US and Iran Trade Fire Near Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US forces shot down four Iranian drones launched toward the Strait of Hormuz and struck Iranian coastal radar sites on Qeshm Island and Goruk, marking the latest escalation in the ongoing conflict between Washington and Tehran.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Lebanese President Aoun Thanks Saudi Crown Prince for Support
item.description: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun spoke by phone with Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman, thanking him for Saudi support to Beirut amid ongoing regional tensions and humanitarian crisis.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan's Asuka-Fujiwara Sites Recommended for UNESCO World Heritage List
item.description: UNESCO's advisory body has recommended adding Japan's Asuka-Fujiwara archaeological sites to the World Heritage List, recognizing their historical significance as ancient capital remains from the 7th century.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russian Drone Attack Kills Four in Kyiv Region
item.description: A Russian drone attack on a dairy factory in a region surrounding the Ukrainian capital Kyiv has killed four people and injured seven more, Ukrainian officials said on Friday.

item.title: 🇺🇳 US Preparing Draft Resolution Condemning Iran at IAEA
item.description: The United States is preparing a draft resolution condemning Iran ahead of next week's meeting of the UN nuclear watchdog's Board of Governors, diplomats said, a step that could complicate wider talks between the US and Iran.

item.title: 🇷🇴 Marine Drone Self-Detonates in Romanian Black Sea Port
item.description: A sea drone self-destructed near an oil terminal in Romania's Black Sea port of Constanta on Friday, without causing casualties, as Ukraine said Russia jammed the vessel causing it to drift off course.

item.title: ☢️ IAEA Brokers Local Ceasefire for Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Plant Repairs
item.description: The International Atomic Energy Agency facilitated a local ceasefire to allow repairs to a power line at the Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant, as Russia's Rosatom reported a Ukrainian drone struck engineers demining the area.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Trump's 'Crazy' Rebuke Undercuts Netanyahu at Critical Moment
item.description: President Donald Trump's criticism of Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has complicated diplomatic efforts at a critical juncture in the broader Middle East conflict, analysts say.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil Little Changed Amid Uncertainty Over US-Iran Peace Deal
item.description: Oil prices remained little changed as markets assessed the prospects for a potential peace deal between the United States and Iran amid continued uncertainty over the conflict's resolution.

item.title: 🚢 US Forces Board Sanctioned Vessel in Indian Ocean
item.description: US forces boarded a sanctioned vessel in the Indian Ocean as part of ongoing enforcement operations, the Pentagon said, amid heightened tensions with Iran and efforts to disrupt sanction evasion networks.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Campaigns in Wisconsin District Targeted by Democrats
item.description: President Donald Trump campaigned in a rural Wisconsin district that Democrats are targeting in midterm elections, vowing to end the Iran war quickly and remove a source of high prices.

item.title: 💰 SpaceX IPO Running Two Times Oversubscribed
item.description: SpaceX's initial public offering is running two times oversubscribed, sources said, indicating strong investor demand for the space company's public debut.

item.title: ☁️ SpaceX Signs Cloud Deal with Google
item.description: SpaceX has signed a cloud computing deal with Google, strengthening the partnership between the space company and the tech giant amid growing demand for satellite-based services.

item.title: 🇰🇼 US Approves $1.98 Billion Counter-Drone System Sale to Kuwait
item.description: The United States approved a potential $1.98 billion sale of counter-drone systems to Kuwait, enhancing the Gulf state's defensive capabilities amid regional tensions.

item.title: 🇾🇪 UN Security Council Marks 2nd Year of Houthi Detentions with Renewed Demands
item.description: The UN Security Council marked the second anniversary of Houthi detentions with renewed demands for the release of those held by the Yemeni rebel group.

item.title: 🌏 Most Asia-Pacific Firms Use AI Without Cutting Jobs
item.description: A survey found that most Asia-Pacific companies are using AI for tasks without cutting jobs, suggesting the technology is augmenting rather than replacing workers in the region.

item.title: 🇰🇷 Defense Stocks Surge on Korean-Made Missile Defense System
item.description: Defense stocks surged following reports about a Korean-made missile defense system, reflecting growing global demand for advanced military technology.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelenskyy and Putin Exchange Messages Amid War
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy and Russian President Vladimir Putin exchanged messages about the ongoing war, with Putin dismissing the need for a face-to-face meeting and Zelenskyy calling for direct talks.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Administration Settlement Fund for Immigration Vote
item.description: The Trump administration's immigration policies continue to face challenges as Congress considers funding for ICE and Border Patrol amid ongoing debates over border security.

item.title: 🌎 US Deports Latin American Migrants from Congo
item.description: The United States deported Latin American migrants from Congo under Trump administration immigration policies, highlighting ongoing enforcement operations.
